content:
✨ wayback-machine-webextension | JavaScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To allow web browser users to easily access, view, and contribute to the historical archive of web pages maintained by the Internet Archive's Wayback Machine.
✨ Key Features: • Save Page Now (auto-save options) • View Oldest, Newest & Overview of archived pages • Wayback Machine Count display • 404 Not Found error handling with archive check
📖 Summary: This web browser extension provides direct access to the Internet Archive's Wayback Machine, allowing users to view historical versions of web pages, save current pages, and receive contextual information. It aims to preserve web history and provide users with tools to explore and understand how URLs have evolved over time.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
